prompt:
Add GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15" to the environment.sessionVariables in modules/common/workstation.nix. This will scale up font rendering in GTK apps (Chrome, Emacs) without affecting Kitty terminal.

Add it alongside the existing variables in the environment.sessionVariables block (around line 36). Just add the one line:
    GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15";

Don't change anything else.
